Last updated: September 22, 2022 Effective: July 15, 2021

DeHub is a protocol built and managed by DeLabs LTD (14204474) office 4, 219 Kensington Highstreet, London, UK, W86BD.

All information provided directly or indirectly by the DeHub team, community or affiliates is for general information purposes or promotions only. It does not constitute investment or financial advice, recommendations or any form of solicitation.

There is no presale or premine of the DeHub Tokens and only liquidity generation events (LGEs) where all funds raised are added to liquidity pools to facilitate trading.

DeHub expressly denies any ability of the DeHub token to represent or confer any ownership right or stake, share, security, or equivalent rights, or any right to receive future revenue shares, intellectual property rights or any other form of participation.

DeHub tokens are created as decentralised smart contracts, and in no way are meant to be a security, commodity or any kind of financial instrument.

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, DeHub tokens are airdropped on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind.

Digital assets are a new frontier and technical innovation so come with volatility and unpredictability. Only part ways with what you can afford to lose.

All DeHub recipients are responsible for implementing reasonable measures for securing their own wallet. DeHub will never hold custody of funds or your seed phrase nor would we ever ask you for this information under any circumstance.

Important Notice: DeHub tokens are strictly for utility purposes in the same way that any in-game or in-app digital tokens or currencies and strictly not an investment. Markets are highly volatile. You could also lose all your money due to any unforeseen errors such as competency failures, technical error, hacks and so on. Therefore, you should only ever spend what you can afford to lose.
